name: Crockpot Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Celery or Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet over medium heat until no longer pink. Remove from the pan and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, add onions and garlic. Cook until the onions are translucent and softened.
3. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, and paprika. Mix well until smooth.
4. Add the cream of celery or mushroom soup and stir to combine.
5. Transfer the mixture into the crockpot and cook on low for 6 hours.
6. Just before serving, add sliced mushrooms and sour cream. Adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve over noodles, rice, or potatoes.
